description: I'm grateful for the development that has been invested on the user's behalf. Over the years, I have relied on Synthesys more and more. My expectations are high for the future.
author: Bob R.
pros: Using AI for articles and essays is only starting to come into its own. Synthesys Studio is the most recent iteration of a developing app with a stable presence. Love the options for producing different content, including long-form essays.
cons: It takes a while to master suggestions and prompts and more patience than I have at crunch times to sort through what is not useful or way off the mark. There is at least an imagined positive correlation between my patience and the quality of the suggested content.
author_profession: Mental Health Counselor and Leadership Team Coach

description: Very Good experience as the avatars and interface was very easy to use.
author: Al M.
pros: Ease of Use and deployment and no monthly fees.
cons: None. Sythesys is a good product and easy to use.

review_title: Not suitable to work in batch
description: I wouldn't recommend anyone Synthesis Studio there are way better alternatives where you can output videos in batch or at least have a better workflow and the lip sync looks more natural. Don't waste your time with this.
author: Antoine L.
pros: It theoretically produces AI Videoclips.
cons: You can't batch create videos. Videoclips are limited to 1min. AI Videos aren't exported unless you have the script prompted out loud before export. The lip-sync is totally unnatural.

author: Kevin B.
pros: Great value , amazing quality fantastic support
cons: Nothing, they continue to improve there Service at no extra cost to end user

author: david S.
pros: I love Synthesys Studio Human AI. This software I use every day to create videos. The figures seem more realistic and human upto other similar softwares i have tried out. The voices in the text to speech seem a lot more natuaral and easier to control how the words are spoken. I usually create a green screen video in Synthesys Studio and then add it to my other videos in different softwares. everything about the software is smooth and easy and all the results are high quality.
cons: I genuinely can not think of any cons about this software

description: All in all, I think Synthesys Studio is worth the price and the effort. A big plus is the fact it is fun to use and keeps your brain active. Once I get all my answers on how to use one of the products, I will certainly rate this a 5/5
author: Sheldon P.
pros: A nice variety of AI products is packaged in one bundle. most are easy to use and work well. The support is exceptional. Actually, better than others that sell this type of product.
cons: Some of the training or the FAQ's do not answer some of your questions. Creating a support ticket results in a quick response, but does not always answer the question asked.

review_title: Used Synthesys Studio for over a year
description: For the year I used it, it was better or easier to use than other programs I tried. There was less of a learning curve, it produced more intricate images and seemed to understand prompts better than other AI programs.
author: Sunny R.
pros: It produced 4 images at a time; could upload an image as a reference; it produced some quality images, depending on the category. It was easy to use.
cons: The annual subscription price and no payment plan. Also, it had problems producing a group of people - there were defects in the composition.

review_title: Experience in creating short informative videos
author: Alex L.
pros: Video creation speed Service Subscription price
cons: I would like to get a lower price. But this is global. The prices for such a service are generally high. And this platform has the lowest price on the market.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: When creating interactive videos, Synthesis Studio offers so many various features while their much pricier competitors focus on trivial so-called features like animated lower thirds. Virtually, in a side-by-side comparison with its unworthy competitors, Synthesis Studio checks all of the intended users' boxes while its "competitors" can only offer a minuscule fraction of those features for an obscenely inflated price.
author: Gabriel P.
pros: The amazing and revolutionary integration of so many features not only creates stunning, awe-inspiring videos but it also eliminates the typical need and cost of outsourcing. More control over the video creation process means eliminating unnecessary tag conversations with outsourcing persons or entities, reduces costs, frustration and renders the videos closest to the specs or features requested by the clients, in a much shorter time.
cons: None we are aware of at the current time

review_title: Automated solution for Text to voice & Video Edit
description: Synthesis saves a lot of time for my projects—now no need to record voice Over & Extra Video Editing Software. Synthesis has a built-in feature for video editing & optimization. Easily change the human avatar for my needs & paste text its automated generate real human voice over
author: Salim K.
pros: Synthesis software has become increasingly helpful for video editing and is a great tool for me to create a video without having to show my face. It's easy to create videos with Synthesis, and the voice is still very Realistic & much more natural-sounding. The software is easy to use and can easily create videos that look like real human beings.
cons: Synthesis Daily Limit not good for agency user, Support Team saying Daily Export up to 20 videos. But for me, this limit is enough. I have been exporting videos multiple times daily, and I do not see any issue
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Synthesys Studio is an awesome piece of software that I recommend to my friends. If you know what you want to say and you need someone to say it for you, this is the app you need. I use it throughout my sites and the end users love the personal messages from different people. Great job guys!
author: Melvin E.
pros: The product is easy to use. I like the fact that when they come out with new features, they don't make you buy the next version of the application. They roll the upgrades into the version you have. A lot of companies come out with something new and make you buy an upgrade.
cons: I don't like the fact that some spokespersons or voice you choose only allow 200 characters, so you end up having to splice the video together by adding additional slides. That sometimes makes the message a little choppy.

review_title: Synthesis Studio is a step into the future
author: Arhyel U.
pros: The fact that you can have free minutes on the free version
cons: The transition to the new UI was done without notification in my inbox

review_title: My short view at Synthesys Studio
description: If I need different voices for projects in different languages I work with Synthesys Studio, he results are satisfying me within a very short time.
author: Peter S.
pros: I like all the different features that helps to use this software in a lot of situations. It generates an high quality output. It is very easy to use.
cons: Sometimes the different tools do not work optimal together. This cold be done a little better.

description: I totally love their customer service and quick response to questions or issues.
author: Marlon C.
pros: It's ability to create great sounding audio recordings and the various voice inflections that are available.
cons: Will love to hear voices of people from the Caribbean.

author: Bikramjit C.
pros: I love this new product. It's very cool. I'm going to be using it in my next project. I made a character in a matter of minutes and he really talks like a real person. I was shocked. I was able to save a lot of time and energy. I used to spend a lot of my time writing scripts and now I don't have to. I used this service for a new project that I'm working on and I love it.
cons: The avatar quality can still be improved

review_title: Great tool for amazing creative results
author: Mateja T.
pros: I like the good quality of generated voices.
cons: The user interface is little confusing, but you'll get used to it.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: High quality of voice and avatar, custom avatar.
cons: The face swap does not always look like the person.

review_title: Wooden Characters generated at the pace of a smail
author: Bill R.
pros: The voices were good. I would rather purchase the program as a voice only app.
cons: It takes hours sometimes to generate a simple short video

description: My experience with this product has been highly satisfactory, particularly regarding customer support. The team is incredibly responsive and effective in addressing any queries one may have. I highly recommend it.
author: Alfredo L.
pros: My experience with this product has been highly satisfactory, particularly regarding customer support.
cons: The absence of multilingual options. In essence, the option to clone one's own voice and have it interpreted in other languages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is very simple to use. Straight forward. Choose what you want and get the media effect.
cons: Character limits. Fair use limits; got unlimited but can be limited even so.

description: It has helped me improve my marketing of my current products. Its been and continues to be a fun learning experience.
author: Susan J.
pros: Ease of Use, Affordable and Affordable Upsells That I'll be using after learning the software.
cons: I found it easy to use and I'm getting better at using it, so I have nothing negative to offer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
